hub_subtitle: Business English para as reuniões com o time Global da Sanofi, congressos médicos e a apresentação de agosto

lesson.menu_title: Diagnostic + First Words -- Who Is Emmanuele Orrico?
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself and your role to the Sanofi Global team -- 33 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + First Words
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Emmanuele Orrico | Aula 1 -- Diagnostic + First Words

listenings.text: Hello Emmanuele. This is Marc Dubois, from Sanofi Global, in Paris. I have good news. The Global team visits Brazil in the last week of August. We want to hear about your market. We have three questions for you. What are the results this year? What are the big challenges? And where are the opportunities? Please prepare a short presentation. Ten minutes is enough. Speak slowly and use simple words. That is perfect for us. See you in August.

Good morning, everyone. Welcome to the global immunology meeting. My name is Claire Bennett. I am the global brand director. Today we have four countries in this room. Brazil, France, Canada and Japan. Every country presents the results for one disease area. Please speak slowly and use simple words. English is not the first language for many people here. Nobody in this room speaks perfect English. We are here to understand each other. So, let us start with Brazil.

extra_audio.text: Good morning. My name is Emmanuele Orrico. I work at Sanofi, in Brazil. I am the national demand manager. I am responsible for eight disease areas in immunology. Nice to meet you.

tips: I work at Sanofi, in Brazil.

items.situation: "And what do you do at Sanofi?"
tips: I am the national demand manager.
I am responsible for eight disease areas.
My team visits doctors every week.

items.situation: The question was too fast. You did not understand it.
tips: Sorry, could you repeat that, please?
Could you speak more slowly, please?
In August, the Global team comes to Brazil.
I want to present our results in English.
